title: Abbreviations — Expand or Keep for the Pharmacy Reader
brief: For each abbreviation, decide whether you should KEEP it (the reader will recognise it) or EXPAND it (the reader is non-specialist or lay).

items.rationale: Standard Latin dose abbreviation between dispensers.
Plain-language guidance is required for patient-facing letters.

items.context: Writing to a non-clinical care manager
items.rationale: Pharmacy-specific service name; expand for a lay audience.
